_schema_note: net_worth values marked method='dashboard_verified' are read directly from MISA's 'Tổng số dư' widget (ground truth). method='reconstructed' values are manually summed from account/transaction APIs and may be off by 100-500M due to undiscovered MISA-internal adjustments (accrued interest, NAV timing, etc.) — do NOT treat reconstructed deltas as precise.

snapshots.note: UNVERIFIED — manual reconstruction, not cross-checked against app's 'Tổng số dư'. Treat as approximate.
